quantizations.name: FP16
quantizations.note: 14.9GB > 12GB GPU VRAM, OOM when loading to GPU. PPL measured with CPU-only (-ngl 0).

quantizations.name: Q8_0
quantizations.method: 8-bit per-block symmetric quantization. Each block of 32 weights shares one FP16 scale factor.
quantizations.best_for: maximum quality, PPL nearly identical to FP16

quantizations.name: Q5_K_M
quantizations.method: K-Quants mixed-precision: attention layers (Q/K/V/O) use Q6_K, FFN layers use Q5_K. Super-block of 256 elements with 16 mini-blocks of 16.

quantizations.name: Q4_K_M
quantizations.method: K-Quants mixed-precision: attention layers use Q6_K, FFN layers use Q4_K. Super-block of 256 elements with 16 mini-blocks of 16.

quantizations.name: IQ4_NL
quantizations.method: Importance-aware quantization with non-linear grid. Uses activation statistics to assign quantization precision based on weight importance.
quantizations.best_for: better PPL than plain Q4_0 at similar speed

quantizations.name: Q4_0
quantizations.method: 4-bit per-block symmetric quantization. Each block of 32 weights shares one FP16 scale. Quant formula: q = round(clamp(x/scale, -8, 7)).

kv_cache.root_cause: Non-FA path transposes V (llama-graph.cpp:2057-2061), block-quantized data cannot be transposed
